title: Marksman Quality Tools Folding Step Stool, Blue, 31.5 (Bottom) x 22 x 24 (W x H x D) cm Top

BEST QUALITY AND SAFETY DESIGN: Our super strong sturdy small folding step stool are made of heavy duty materials for long lasting durability. The stool can hold up to 250 lbs Max. On the surface of the folding step stool have the skid resistant top which will give you amazing comfort and safety for everyone, including kids and adults

SPACE SAVING AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Folds flat for easy space-saving storage, you can store the folding step stool at anyplace, put it in your car backseat when go for a picnic with friends. your kids also can take it easily as the lightweight stool.

CONVENIENT AND PORTABLE: This foldable step stool is super convenient with the built - in handles. It opens and folds up in a split second with only one hand, great for you when you have your other hand full
